meaning: n.页边的空白,(湖、池等的)边缘,极限,利润,差数,(时间、金额等的)富余vt.加边于,加旁注于
examples: The group had a net profit margin of 30% last year.
He won by a narrow margin.
She added her comments in the margin.
The margin at these segments averaged 19% in the first nine months of 2004.
Various surveys gave Mr Romney a 46-67% margin, with Mr Obama trailing on 22-25%.
